metadata.description: Helix Squads — Public Marketplace for Claude Code. Infrastructure and meta-tooling squads (cartographer, claude-code-mastery, incident-response-squad, stack-auditors, synthetic-intelligence-factory, nirvana-squad-creator, nirvana-context-enricher, oracle-supreme-squad).

plugins.name: cartographer
plugins.description: Cartographer — Ecosystem archaeology squad. Continuously excavates the monorepo, catalogs all artifacts (functions, agents, workflows, schemas, hooks, MCPs), maps real dependencies, and exposes this via CLI+MCP so every agent queries BEFORE acting. Enforces IDS: REUSE > ADAPT > CREATE.

plugins.name: claude-code-mastery
plugins.description: Claude Code Full Spectrum Expertise — hooks, skills, subagents, MCP, plugins, agent teams, customização e integração

plugins.name: incident-response-squad
plugins.description: Squad especialista em resposta a incidentes para DevOps/SRE — análise de logs, correlação de causa raiz, execução de runbooks, comunicação de status e geração de post-mortems blameless

plugins.name: nirvana-context-enricher
plugins.description: Parallel multi-agent context enrichment — deep research, skills ecosystem, and academic literature synthesized into 16-section architectural briefings

author.name: Generated by Nirvana Squad Creator (gutomec/nirvana-context-enricher lineage)

plugins.name: nirvana-squad-creator
plugins.description: Gera squads AIOS otimizados a partir de linguagem natural — pipeline de 9 fases com análise, geração, otimização, validação, README multi-idioma, deploy e publicação no squads.sh

plugins.name: oracle-supreme-squad
plugins.description: 🔮 ORACLE SUPREME — O squad transcendente que extrai o DNA do Claude Code

author.name: Extracted from Claude Code + Enhanced by Oracle Protocols

plugins.name: stack-auditors
plugins.description: Stack Auditors — Celebrity-engineer mentor council for L4 superior audit. 11 mentors based on historical computing figures (Carmack, van-Rossum, Stonebraker, Torvalds, Jobs, Musk, Schneier, Kim, Beck, Newman, Norman) + sa-council orchestrator. Complements AIOX execution layer with verdicts grounded in evidence (fundamentation skills). Invoked by rules (70% paths-triggered) and hooks (30% catastrop

plugins.name: synthetic-intelligence-factory
plugins.description: Meta-system that manufactures specialized AI intelligences from any professional domain. Distills elite expertise (top 0.1%) through systematic extraction and 7-layer cognitive architecture engineering. Produces system prompts (15k-25k words), knowledge bases (50-200 docs), and contextual calibration forms.
